On this page

FeaturedProject ​

Featured project hero section for highlighting a single project.

Preview ​

Featured Project

This project represents the best work I have done. It combines everything I have learned about building production-ready applications.

TypeScriptReactNext.jsPrismaPostgreSQL
5000 stars300 forks
GitHubLive

Import ​

tsx
import { FeaturedProject } from '@reallukemanning/folio'

Usage ​

tsx
<FeaturedProject project={featuredProject} />

Props ​

PropTypeRequiredDescription
projectFolioProject | null | undefinedYesFeatured project data

Returns null if project is null or undefined.

Data Attributes ​

AttributeDescription
data-folio-featuredFeatured container
data-folio-featured-imageFeatured project image

Example ​

tsx
import { FeaturedProject, filterByFeatured } from '@reallukemanning/folio'

function HomePage({ projects }) {
  const featured = filterByFeatured(projects, true)[0]
  
  return (
    <main>
      <FeaturedProject project={featured} />
      <ProjectGrid>
        {/* Other projects */}
      </ProjectGrid>
    </main>
  )
}

Implementation Details ​

FeaturedProject internally uses ProjectView and renders:

  • Project image (if available)
  • Background section
  • Why section
  • Stats
  • Links

This provides a complete project overview in a single component call.
